title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Lesson Visibility – All 4 conditions met – Lesson shown

A lesson exists that: Location = Location A, Bookable_Flag=TRUE, Status=Published, Lesson date = 2026-05-12 (above 3-day advance booking threshold = 2026-05-08).

2. "View the lesson in the list"
steps_data:

2. "Target lesson is displayed in the Browse list"

steps_data:

2. "Lesson at Location B is NOT shown in the list"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Lesson Visibility – Lesson date within minimum advance days – Lesson hidden
description: AC 02.2 — BR-7: BVA: A lesson with date < 2026-05-08 (today + 3 days) must NOT appear in Browse list.
preconditions:
Student user has active LA for Location A.
A lesson at Location A exists with: Bookable_Flag=TRUE, Published, lesson_date = 2026-05-07 (today + 2 days; 1 day below the 3-day threshold of 2026-05-08).
steps_result:
1. "Login to app as student user and open Browse Lessons"
2. "Scroll through the lesson list"
steps_data:
1. "Browse screen shown"
2. "Lesson with date < 2026-05-08 is NOT shown"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Lesson Visibility – Advance days threshold evaluated in lesson timezone – Device timezone behind
description: AC 02.2 — BR-7 / BR-26: BVA (Timezone): The today + 3 days advance booking threshold must be evaluated using LESSON timezone (JST), not device timezone (ICT). Near midnight JST, device date (ICT) lags 1 day behind JST.
preconditions:
Lesson timezone = UTC+9 (JST). Student's device timezone = UTC+7 (ICT).
Current time = 2026-05-06 00:30 JST = 2026-05-05 22:30 ICT (device shows 2026-05-05).
Advance booking threshold = 3 days.
Lesson exists with lesson_date = 2026-05-08.
JST: min visible = 2026-05-06 + 3 = 2026-05-09. lesson_date 2026-05-08 < 2026-05-09 = HIDDEN.
ICT: min visible = 2026-05-05 + 3 = 2026-05-08. lesson_date 2026-05-08 >= 2026-05-08 = device WOULD show.
steps_result:
1. "Login to app as student user (device = UTC+7 ICT, device date = 2026-05-05) and open Browse Lessons"
2. "Look for the lesson with lesson_date = 2026-05-08"
3. "Confirm that ICT-based calculation would have shown the lesson"
steps_data:
1. "Browse screen shown"
2. "Lesson is NOT visible (hidden); JST threshold = 2026-05-09; lesson_date 2026-05-08 is below threshold"
3. "System uses lesson TZ (JST), not device TZ; ICT threshold 2026-05-08 would show it but system hides it"
milestone_id:
1. "Device date = 2026-05-05 22:30 ICT; Lesson TZ = JST; Current JST = 2026-05-06 00:30"
2. "lesson_date = 2026-05-08; JST threshold = 2026-05-09"
3. "ICT threshold = 2026-05-08; device would show but system must hide"
